message:
feat(abi): port 15 _nss_compat_* NSS plugin entrypoints (bd-ubjtz)

Close the libnss_compat.so.2 surface gap by mirroring the existing
_nss_files_* stub conventions to the compat-plugin entry points:

- _nss_compat_endgrent / endpwent / endspent — return SUCCESS
- _nss_compat_setgrent / setpwent / setspent — accept stayopen, SUCCESS
- _nss_compat_getgrent_r / getpwent_r / getspent_r — NOTFOUND + ENOENT
- _nss_compat_getgrnam_r / getpwnam_r / getspnam_r — NOTFOUND + ENOENT
- _nss_compat_getgrgid_r / getpwuid_r — NOTFOUND + ENOENT
- _nss_compat_initgroups_dyn — NOTFOUND + ENOENT (no extra groups appended)

Reuses the existing nss_files_end_stub! / set_stayopen_stub! /
get_ent_stub! / get_by_str_stub! / get_by_int_stub! macros so the
compat plugin shares the same hardened error-set helpers.

+ 6 abi tests covering SUCCESS for end/set, NOTFOUND+ENOENT for
get-by-key, and initgroups_dyn null-tolerance.
